subject: URGENT: calendarbeaf-prod events API failing
body:
Events API is returning XHR failures on PROD:

XHR failed loading: GET https://calendarbeaf-prod.azurewebsites.net/api/events?appId=2&startDate=2026-03-31&endDate=2026-09-27&...

This is blocking HarmonyJunction from showing any events. Please investigate.

- Cord (HJ)
